NEN COMBAT

generate techniques — 6 types × 4 vows × 5 threats = infinite possibilities

power = base(100) × type_multiplier × vow_multiplier × threat_multiplier

Generate a Nen technique

POWER:

The six Nen types

Click to select, then generate a technique with that type.

Power scaling

The stricter the vow, the stronger the technique. The Dark Continent threat adds 50% power. Love (Enhancer) has the highest base multiplier.

誓約 Vow
1.5× multiplier — a promise that binds
制約 Limitation
1.8× — restriction concentrates power
条件 Condition
2.0× — the more specific, the stronger
代償 Penalty
3.0× — real consequences make it binding
